name: Basil Marinated Catfish with Pickled Peaches (Gc)
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all ingredients for the basil marinade and reserve in the refrigerator, covered tightly.
2. Mix all ingredients for the pickled peaches and boil for 4 minutes. Remove from heat and refrigerate overnight.
3. Rub catfish with the basil marinade and let stand for 1 hour in the refrigerator.
4. While the catfish is still very cold, grill for 5 minutes on each side.
5. Slice peaches and place on top of catfish. Drizzle some of the pickling juice over the top.
Yield: 4 servings
